case_title: DE MESA, KHALIL L. VS HANLON, GREER

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DE MESA, KHALIL L. AS TO DEFENDANT HANLON, GREER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HANLON, GREER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE MESA, KHALIL L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANLON, GREER $2,013.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,063.00, THE COURT DETERMINED PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2,910 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE, AND $750 FOR BODILY INJURY. THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 45% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HANLON, GREER
